name: insta-follow-checker
description: Browser scripts for checking Instagram follow-backs with exact results when relationship data is visible and conservative unknowns when Instagram blocks data.
author: dongt10

scripts.check: node --check src/check-follow-back.js && node --check src/check-non-followers-public.js && node scripts/verify-bookmarklet.mjs && node scripts/verify-generic.mjs && node scripts/verify-exact-search.mjs && node scripts/verify-batch-self.mjs && node scripts/verify-rate-limit-wall.mjs && node scripts/verify-html-wall.mjs && node scripts/verify-public.mjs && node scripts/simulate-scale.mjs && node scripts/simulate-public-scale.mjs
